intro: Astragalus membranaceus tea, also known as Huang Qi tea, is a traditional Chinese herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being. This adaptogenic tea is believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fatigue, stress, and respiratory issues. When consumed regularly, astragalus membranaceus tea is thought to enhance the body's natural defenses and promote a sense of balance and vitality.
